overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person walk through downtown Los Santos. The clip begins with skyscraper views, transitions to street-level walking past pedestrians, crosses a busy intersection with a passing transit bus, continues along city streets with traffic, and ends with ascending curved stairs in a modern plaza.

events.description: camera tilts down from skyward view to street level while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at skyscrapers, then tilting view down to street level

building under construction covered in green safety netting and scaffolding
palm trees growing on top of a building rooftop
tall building with reflective dark glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a skyward view of towering skyscrapers against a clear blue sky. The camera tilts down to reveal street level while walking forward, showcasing the Maze Bank tower and surrounding high-rise buildings in downtown Los Santos.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city sidewalk lined with trees, passing pedestrians waiting at the corner. A white delivery truck drives by on the street as the camera approaches a crosswalk, with the concrete building featuring a large mural dominating the center view.

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide downtown intersection, the camera moves across the white-striped crosswalk. A large Santos Transit bus passes closely by from the left, followed by a pink convertible and blue sedan. The construction building with green netting remains visible on the right as vehicles move through the intersection.

events.description: passing through intersection with green traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street past parked cars and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: taxi cab with yellow roof driving alongside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane city street lined with modern glass skyscrapers. The camera passes a taxi cab and moves through an intersection with a green traffic light. The Maze Bank tower is visible ahead, while the construction building from previous segments falls out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern plaza with curved tiled stairs and sculpture

agents.ego_description: walking up curved tiled stairs in a modern urban plaza with benches

modern white apartment building with curved facade and balconies
large abstract red metal sculpture in the plaza

red tiled underside of the building overhang

segments.scene_description: Turning off the street into a semi-covered modern plaza, the camera approaches curved tiled stairs. The area features a large red abstract sculpture, metal benches, and a distinctive curved white apartment building visible above. The camera ascends the stairs under a red-tiled overhang, transitioning from the busy street to a quieter pedestrian space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins with a towering urban perspective and descends into the bustling street life of downtown Los Santos before concluding in a quiet modern plaza. It begins with a skyward view of skyscrapers against a clear blue sky, tilting down to street level as the camera moves forward past the Maze Bank tower. As the camera proceeds along a tree-lined sidewalk, it passes pedestrians and a white delivery truck before crossing a wide intersection where a Santos Transit bus and colorful cars stream past a construction site draped in green netting. The scene then shifts along a multi-lane street flanked by glass high-rises and passing taxis, moving through a green light as the construction site fades from view. Finally, the camera turns away from the traffic into a semi-covered plaza, passing a red abstract sculpture and metal benches before ascending curved tiled stairs beneath a red-tiled overhang.
